ConnectionStrings._comment: Real value is in appsettings.Local.json (local) or the ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection env var (Render). Left blank here so no secret is committed.

Supabase._comment: Real Url/ServiceKey live in appsettings.Local.json (local) or Supabase__* env vars (Render). Blank here so no secret is committed. If blank, PDF uploads fall back to local wwwroot/uploads.
